message:
test(proptest): add 47 property tests for storage and tantivy_reindex coverage gaps

Storage (42 new, 56→98 total): DbCheckStatus serde+Display, DbCheckItem serde,
DbCheckReport serde+has_errors+problem_count, DbRepairItem+DbRepairReport
serde+all_succeeded, TableStats/PaneStats/EventTypeStats/DbStatsReport serde,
SearchLintSeverity/SearchLint/SearchSuggestion serde+skip_serializing_if,
SemanticBudgetConfig serde+Default, SemanticBudgetMetrics serde+Default,
SemanticBudgetSnapshot serde, CorrelationRef/Correlation/PaneInfo/HandledInfo serde,
TimelineEvent/Timeline serde, SearchResult serde, DailyMetricSummary/AgentMetricBreakdown
serde, MigrationForensicBackendState/MigrationCheckpoint/CorruptionDetail/CaptureContext/
Bundle serde, MigrationRollbackExecutionState serde+Default+methods,
MigrationRollbackExecutionReport serde, MigrationRollbackExecutionError tagged serde.

Tantivy reindex (5 new, 40→45 total): ReindexStats serde roundtrip, deterministic
serialization, JSON keys, clone, zero-duration EPS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
